# Alder Heritage Homes — AI-Readable Business Summary
# https://www.alderheritagehomes.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-05

## Business Overview
Alder Heritage Homes is a licensed California real estate company that buys houses for cash in Fresno, Clovis, and throughout the Central Valley. Founded and operated by Connor Morris, California DRE #02219124.

## Key Differentiators
- Licensed California real estate agent (DRE #02219124) — NOT a wholesaler
- Uses own capital to purchase homes directly — no assignment contracts
- Provides written cash offers within 24 hours
- Can close in as little as 3–7 days
- Zero commissions, zero hidden fees
- Price match guarantee
- Specializes in probate homes, inherited properties, foreclosure situations, and distressed sales

## Contact Information
- Phone: (559) 281-8016
- Email: connor@alderheritagehomes.com
- Website: https://www.alderheritagehomes.com
- Service Area: Fresno, Clovis, Visalia, Bakersfield, Stockton, Modesto, Madera, Hanford, Lemoore, Tulare, and 30+ Central Valley cities

## Services
- Cash home buying (any condition, any situation)
- Probate and inherited property sales
- Foreclosure prevention (sell before auction)
- Divorce home sales
- Landlord/rental property buyouts
- Corporate relocation sales
- Estate home sales
- Hoarder house purchases
- Fire damage, water damage, code violation properties

## Process
1. Call (559) 281-8016 or submit address online
2. Receive written cash offer within 24 hours
3. Choose closing date (as fast as 3–7 days)
4. Close through licensed title company — receive cash

## Credentials
- California DRE License: #02219124
- Google Reviews: 5.0 stars (32 reviews)
- BBB Accredited Business
